value.text: Implemented timeout hardening in tests/integration/cli.integration.spec.ts by setting the core lifecycle test timeout to 60000ms to reduce sweep-load flakiness. (2) node dist/cli.js test-all --status in_progress --timeout 2400 --json => totals items=6 linked_tests=30 passed=29 failed=0 skipped=1 (exit 0).
